Camera.description: A physical or logical camera device used for video surveillance and analytics.

Camera.capacity_group_token.description: Token identifying the capacity group this camera belongs to.

Camera.created_at.description: Timestamp when the camera was created.

Camera.edge.description: Boolean indicating if the camera is an edge device.

Camera.is_dvr.description: Boolean indicating if the camera is a DVR.

Camera.snapshot_url.description: URL to the latest snapshot image of the camera.

Camera.state.description: Current operational state of the camera (e.g., active, inactive).

Camera.updated_at.description: Timestamp when the camera was last updated.

Camera.video_modules.description: List of active video analytics module codes.

CameraSource.description: The connection details and stream URL for a camera.

CameraSource.host.description: IP address or hostname of the camera.

CameraSource.url.description: Full RTSP URL for the video stream.

Company.description: A company record. The `name` and `description` fields are searchable via natural-language queries.

Company.description.description: Long-form company description used for hybrid search.

Company.name.description: Free-text company name. Stored on the node for exact lookups and embedded into qlink/Qdrant for vector search.

DetectionLine.description: A virtual line in the video frame for crossing detection.

DetectionLine.obj_classes.description: List of object classes monitored by this line.

OnvifConfig.description: ONVIF protocol configuration for camera control.

Place.description: A physical location where a camera is installed.

Place.description.description: Detailed description or address of the place.

Place.group_id.description: ID of the group this place belongs to.

RegionOfInterest.description: A defined area within the video frame for analytics events.

RegionOfInterest.situation_id.description: ID of the situation associated with this ROI.

RegionOfInterest.watch_people_activity.description: Whether to watch for people activity.

Tag.description: A tag associated with a camera for categorization.

VideoAnalyticsModule.description: A specific analytics module (e.g., FaceRecognition, SituationAnalytics) configured on a camera.

VideoStreamingConfig.storage_depth.description: Number of days to store video.
